title: Authority to Administer Oaths. The Secretary, or any person authorized
content: 60 under existing laws, shall have the authority to administer oaths and require the 61 60 attendance of witnesses or the production of any book, paper, correspondence, 1 memoranda and other documents relevant or material to the case or inquiry. 2 3 The Secretary may authorize other DMW personnel to administer oaths. 4 5
